title: Failed to receive response from n8n on local network
symptom: When accessing the n8n chat from another computer on the same local network, it returns 'Error: Failed to receive response'. This issue does not occur when accessing from localhost.
applies_when: Accessing from a different computer on the same local network
not_this_if: n8n is not running in Docker
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n Docker containers may not be properly started or running, leading to failed responses when accessed from external devices on the same network. This can happen if the Docker containers were not initiated correctly after configuration changes.
fix_steps: Navigate to the directory containing the docker-compose.yml file
Run the command 'docker-compose up' to start the containers
agent_instruction: Run 'docker-compose up' in the command line to start the n8n Docker containers.
